stages.title: Storyline Architecture
stages.summary: Shape the premise, reader promise, argument arc, evidence map, chapter thesis chain, and prose style contract before drafting.
stages.goal: Create an OPL-compatible book authoring Foundry Agent that turns source material into a coherent book. The workflow has two core parts: first shape the storyline, then materialize the book as chapters, illustrations, tables, layout, and quality-controlled handoff. The agent must preserve content consistency, writing style consistency, evidence grounding, affirmative human prose, illustration and table plans, typography checks, and owner-gated publication decisions.

stages.title: Book Materialization
stages.summary: Create chapter drafts and production specs, then run consistency, AI-flavor, illustration, table, layout, and handoff checks.
stages.goal: Create an OPL-compatible book authoring Foundry Agent that turns source material into a coherent book. The workflow has two core parts: first shape the storyline, then materialize the book as chapters, illustrations, tables, layout, and quality-controlled handoff. The agent must preserve content consistency, writing style consistency, evidence grounding, affirmative human prose, illustration and table plans, typography checks, and owner-gated publication decisions.
